# Sag

**Summary**: The settling of weighting material in the drilling fluid.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-aljaberi|AlJaberi, 2022]] measured sag factors for various mud formulations.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-aljaberi|AlJaberi, 2022]] Critical for ensuring uniform density and transport capacity in high-density fluids.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-aljaberi|AlJaberi, 2022]] Measured by comparing densities at top and bottom of the fluid.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The measured sag factors fell within the acceptable range (below 0.53) for all samples. ([[2022-aljaberi|AlJaberi, 2022, p. 138]])
